hero.title: PDF Accessibility, Automation & Alt Text — All in One Place
hero.subtitle: From extraction to accessibility automation, Arohio helps you generate structured manifests, write alt text at scale, and export compliant outputs in a clean, repeatable workflow.

featureTools.heading: Every tool you need to make PDFs accessible — in one place
featureTools.subheading: Upload, extract, generate, and export with a workflow designed for speed, quality, and consistent accessibility outputs.

cards.title: PDF → Image Manifest
cards.desc: Upload a PDF and instantly generate a structured image manifest with page references ready for review and accessibility workflows.
bullets: Page index and bounding boxes included
Works for scanned and digital PDFs

cards.title: Image Manifest → Alt Text
cards.desc: Upload an Excel or CSV manifest and generate short or long alt text at scale with consistent tone and length controls.
bullets: Short and long alt text generation
Tone presets for different content types

cards.title: PDF → Alt Text (Direct)
cards.desc: Generate alt text directly from a PDF without spreadsheets. Great for quick accessibility passes and rapid exports.

proofStats.heading: Designed to save time, reduce manual effort, and improve quality
proofStats.subheading: Arohio is built for teams who need reliable accessibility outputs without slowing down production.

stats.label: Teams onboarded
stats.hint: Publishing, EdTech, and content teams using Arohio for accessibility workflows.

stats.label: Consistency rate
stats.hint: Standardized outputs with review-friendly structure for faster QA cycles.

stats.label: Faster turnaround
stats.hint: Reduce manual effort with automation, batch export, and repeatable workflows.

contactCta.heading: Want to see Arohio on your PDFs?
contactCta.subheading: Share a sample PDF and your target output format. We’ll recommend the best workflow and a clean delivery plan.
bullets: PDF type (scanned or digital) and approximate page count
What you need (image manifest, alt text, or direct export)
Preferred output formats (XLSX, CSV, JSON, XML, HTML)
contactCta.noteText: We usually respond within 24 hours (business days)
